creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
Created attachment 236449
patch to update port from 1.21 to 1.22

Update to 1.22.

Thanks to Samy Mahmoudi <samy.mahmoudi@gmail.com>:
- Fix support for handling aggregated lagg(4) interfaces.
- Add support for interfaces configured using "create_args_xyzN=" in the rc.conf file.
